title: Lean Africa-site malaria RCTs as a transfer template
note: 27 of 80 Africa-site malaria trials met the pragmatic transfer shortlist; malaria has the strongest cross-topic shortlist signal

title: Lean Africa-site HIV RCTs as a transfer template
note: 18 of 80 Africa-site HIV trials met the pragmatic transfer shortlist

title: Lean Africa-site hypertension RCTs as a transfer template
note: 8 of 65 Africa-site hypertension trials met the pragmatic transfer shortlist

title: Lean Africa-site pregnancy-related RCTs as a transfer template
note: 12 of 80 Africa-site pregnancy-related trials met the pragmatic transfer shortlist
